race.comment: A good contest. MOLTEUNO (9) resumed beaten a neck in a CL1 over 1100m at Cowra. Fitter and the local should be handy in the run. She's further improved and rates well. RIPPANA (7) made significant late ground last start to get up for third over 1100m at this track. Blinkers applied for the first time and she has more to give. Fitter again and can fight out the finish. DRAMA DODGER (6) just missed in a Wagga 62 first up and then improved again there, easily winning a 58. Jumps from the rails gate and races forward. Has decent claims in a suitable race. The lone career win of ROCKET RUDEE (4) came when fresh so keep safe.
